# Use Tomcat 10 as the base (since you are using Tomcat 10)
FROM tomcat:10-jdk17-openjdk-slim

# Optional: Remove default Tomcat apps to speed up startup
RUN rm -rf /usr/local/tomcat/webapps/*

# Copy the WAR file generated by Maven into the Docker image
# Note: Jenkins runs docker build from the workspace root
COPY target/Java-web-app.war /usr/local/tomcat/webapps/ROOT.war

EXPOSE 8080

CMD ["catalina.sh", "run"]
